old_claim.note: The previous broad herbal-preparation claim did not represent its documented fermented-wine carrier as a dependency.

new_claim.note: The scoped Abydos preparation dispensed herbs and tree resins in grape wine, making a fermented beverage the documented remedy carrier.

source_shape.source_locator: Abstract and Discussion identify grape wine as the carrier through which herbs and tree resins were dispensed.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The analyzed Abydos preparation contains plant additives in a fermented grape-wine medium.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Because the node is now limited to this chemically identified recipe, the wine medium is constitutive rather than one optional later formulation.

ontology_before: Herbal preparation was treated as an undifferentiated umbrella with no process matching its dated evidence.
ontology_after: The dated claim follows the archaeochemical Abydos recipe and represents its fermented carrier explicitly.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: herbal_medicine_preparation now requires fermentation_basic for the scoped Abydos herbal-wine preparation.
would_reject_if: The Abydos residue were shown not to contain grape wine or the plant additives were shown to come from an unrelated deposit.
short_reason: The directly analyzed remedy used fermented grape wine as its carrier.
